channel.title: Pier — Blog
channel.description: Practical writing on legacy websites, FTP, MySQL and AI-assisted edits.

item.title: Legacy PHP reinfection: the .htaccess wall that holds
item.description: A client's WordPress kept getting reinfected every few days. Cleaning files wasn't enough. Here's the .htaccess pattern that finally stopped it.
item.dc:creator: Pier editorial

item.title: Legacy WordPress .htaccess: the rules that fix 80%
item.description: The .htaccess rules that quietly resolve most of the redirect loops, mixed content and broken pretty-permalinks on inherited WordPress sites.
item.dc:creator: Pier editorial
